creator: meka@tilda.center
text:
Created attachment 196252
patch-scan.py

Command "hp-scan -mcolor" produces:
 error: Error saving file: cannot write mode RGBA as JPEG (I/O)

This patch is from https://bugs.launchpad.net/hplip/+bug/1741214 and to be precise, it's this one: https://launchpadlibrarian.net/352548364/hplip-jpeg-compression.patch. I just made it so that port system uses it.
